intro: Maughania lacei, also known as Vrikshamla, is a medicinal plant belonging to the family Leguminosae, commonly found in the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant is valued for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Maughania lacei include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
